title: Derived visibility with calculatedValues
description: A calculatedValue is a named expression over other answers. It is a legal visibleIf target — useful when the same condition gates several questions, or the condition is more complex than a single comparison. calculatedValues count as 'defined' for the dangling-reference lint; they are not questions and never reach the warehouse.

elements.name: contact_pref
elements.title: How would you prefer we follow up?

elements.name: contact_detail
elements.title: Best address or number to reach you?
elements.description: Reachable whenever wants_contact is true (email or phone). Gating on the derived value avoids repeating the two-way condition. Contact details are identifying — left at the default pii_risk 'high'.
